brief_notes: Describes the same RosettaVS platform but benchmark tables are severely weakened -- CASF-2016 results use qualitative descriptors ('Top-tier among all methods', 'High success rate') instead of actual numbers. The crystallography table lacks resolution, R-factors, or any quantitative validation data. The NaV1.7 results do include specific IC50 values which is good, but the inconsistency between vague benchmark data and specific hit data undermines overall credibility. Feature comparison table is useful but shallow.
